business_problem: Baylor University was operating 17–18 disparate finance, HR, and planning systems with manual processes—new-hire onboarding required up to 26 separate steps and payroll was run 11 times per pay cycle. The university also needed scalable systems to support a fast-growing online education business approaching $37M in revenue and a research-university growth strategy.
solution_summary: Baylor University consolidated finance, planning, and HR data from 17–18 disparate legacy systems onto a unified Oracle Fusion Cloud suite (ERP, EPM, and HCM) hosted on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure. The integration redesigned hiring onboarding from 26 manual steps to 6–7 automated steps, reduced payroll cycle runs from 11 to 2, and provided the financial visibility and scalability needed to support rapid growth in online education ($37M revenue) and pursue research-university expansion.
business_outcome: Baylor replaced 17–18 systems with one Oracle cloud platform, cut new-hire onboarding from 26 steps to 6–7, reduced payroll runs per cycle from 11 to 2, and gained the financial visibility needed to scale a $37M online-education business while pursuing research-university status.
metrics: Payroll runs per cycle reduced from 11 to 2
architecture_clues: Single Oracle Fusion Cloud suite for ERP, EPM, and HCM
evidence_quotes: Baylor University replaced 17 to 18 disparate finance, HR, and planning systems with Oracle Fusion Cloud ERP, EPM, and HCM.
New-hire onboarding now takes 6 or 7 steps instead of 26, and payroll runs were reduced from 11 to 2 per cycle.
Baylor's online-education business has grown to $37 million in revenue.

solution_components.name: Oracle Fusion Cloud ERP
solution_components.role: Consolidates financial data from legacy systems; manages accounts payable, receivable, and general ledger.

solution_components.name: Oracle Fusion Cloud EPM
solution_components.role: Provides enterprise planning and budgeting across finance and research operations.

solution_components.name: Oracle Fusion Cloud HCM
solution_components.role: Centralizes HR data, automates new-hire onboarding, manages payroll, and benefits administration for university workforce.

solution_components.name: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure
solution_components.role: Provides cloud hosting, scalability, and infrastructure for the unified Fusion Cloud suite.

data_flow: Finance, HR, and planning data from 17–18 legacy systems flows into Oracle Fusion Cloud ERP, HCM, and EPM; onboarding and payroll workflows process transformed data; integration provides single source of truth.
